<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> mission modifier icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox mission modifier
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
|can_be_chosen=<%~ it.canBeChosen %>
}}<section end="infobox" />
<% if (it.descriptionText) { %>
<section begin="description" /><%~ it.descriptionText %><section end="description" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasProperties) { %>
<section begin="properties" />
<%~ it.propertiesSection -%>
<section end="properties" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasTierWeights) { %>
<section begin="tier_weights" />
<%~ it.tierWeightsSection -%>
<section end="tier_weights" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasVariants) { %>
<section begin="variants" />
<%~ it.variantsSection -%>
<section end="variants" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasRewards) { %>
<section begin="rewards" />
<%~ it.rewardsSection -%>
<section end="rewards" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Mission Modifiers]]
<% if (!it.canBeChosenRaw) { -%>
[[Category:Hidden Mission Modifiers]]
<% } -%>
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated mission modifier source pages]]
